stemHtml: A single-engined piston has been on a 3 hours IFR flight. The pilot has been monitoring a slightly increased oil temperature for the last hour. For the last 10 minutes, he/she has been observing various urgency messages on the radio frequency. If the pilot was to transmit a distress message, what would be the priority of urgency messages in relation to distress messages as per the order of aeronautical radio messages? Urgency messages...

options.a: Are routine radio messages that have NO special priority.
